# Attribution and provenance

Foundation 1.1.0 was authored by AgentKogei in 2026 and is distributed under CC BY 4.0. Suggested attribution: “Foundation Interface System by AgentKogei, licensed under CC BY 4.0; changes were made.”

All prose, semantic token selections, examples, and evaluation materials in this Pack Release are original AgentKogei work. The release contains no third-party assets, fonts, source code, or remote resources. References to React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, WCAG, and Creative Commons identify compatibility or standards and do not incorporate their content.
